coreJobStatement: Transform steel, polymer, and propellant inputs into safe, precisely-dimensioned small arms and ordnance components certified to performance, safety, and traceability standards for military, law enforcement, and authorized commercial markets
productJobStatement: Help Blank and Semi-Finished Forming to supply near-net-shape steel component blanks within firearms-grade dimensional and material property specifications to downstream CNC machining operations
anchorLevel: L5 (Precision Cold-Drawn Steel Profiles within L6b Blank & Semi-Finished Forming)

segments.name: Military OEM
segments.characteristics: Select-fire capable, MIL-SPEC acceptance, ITAR-controlled supply chain, 100% lot traceability
segments.targetabilityReason: Receiver / bolt carrier profiles; ITAR registration required
segments.circumstance: Select-fire capable, MIL-SPEC acceptance, ITAR-controlled supply chain

segments.name: Law Enforcement Supply
segments.characteristics: Semi-auto, service-grade, domestic supply preferred, contract volume
segments.targetabilityReason: Slide rail + receiver profiles; lower regulatory burden than military
segments.circumstance: Semi-auto, service-grade, domestic supply preferred, contract volume

segments.name: Commercial / Sporting OEM
segments.targetabilityReason: Barrel blanks + slide rails; strongest near-term growth segment

segments.name: Precision / Custom Gunsmith
segments.characteristics: Low volume, high geometry specificity, prototype quantities
segments.targetabilityReason: Blocked by C7 (100kg min batch) except with NRE die model
segments.circumstance: Low volume, high geometry specificity, prototype quantities

segments.name: Sub-Component Supplier (no final assembly)
segments.characteristics: Component-only, no proof/assembly step, OEM-grade tolerances
segments.targetabilityReason: Profile blanks for machining shops supplying firearms OEMs
segments.circumstance: Component-only, no proof/assembly step, OEM-grade tolerances

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn near-net steel profiles (ZOLLERN)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week tooling lead; 100 kg min batch; cannot IH short parts in-house (C9); steel-only (C6). ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Drop / hammer forged blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Superior grain structure for high-stress military receivers; longer die lead + forging trial; flash removal adds machining step. ~45% share.

alternatives.name: CNC billet machining from bar stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero tooling lead; full geometry flexibility; 40-60% material waste; high machining time per part; uneconomic at volume. ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Investment casting (trigger groups, small parts)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Enables complex 3D geometries; +-0.3-0.5mm accuracy requires secondary machining; not suitable for constant-cross-section profiles. ~5% share.

alternatives.name: Do nothing / continue billet machining (Status Quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost; zero new supplier qualification; retains all machining waste; dominant competitor.
